programme.desc: The dinner-party challenge comes from the Midlands, with dog lover Becci hosting the first night and hoping her Cornish-themed menu impresses guests Ian, Lorna, Louise and Hezron

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business consultant Louise hosts the second night of the week in the Midlands, hoping that her trusty hostess trolley and Spanish food will propel her towards the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the third night of the competition from the Midlands and 24-year-old Hezron's turn to host, and he hopes to wow his guests with a Caribbean-inspired menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The penultimate evening from the Midlands sees the second taste of the Caribbean in as many days - but host Lorna is convinced her take is the real deal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in the Midlands, business owner Ian hopes to scoop the prize by whisking his guests off to the Canary Islands. However, having cremated the first course, he must stomach a large portion of blunt feedback

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A wedding becomes uncomfortable for Doug when he discovers Carrie's sexual history with the bridegroom, but Arthur is more preoccupied with the choice of food. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug takes action when a neighbour's dog keeps him and Carrie awake all night, and Arthur thinks he is the inspiration for a comic-strip. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton lines up five properties on Kefalonia for husband and wife Joe and Fiona, who fell in love with the Greek island during a sailing holiday 15 years ago

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lorna and Gordon are relocating and looking for their new dream home around the seaside town of Benalmádena on Spain's Costa del Sol. For their budget of £250,000, they want enough space for their family of 19 children and grandchildren to come and visit. Ben Hillman shows them five great options, but will any measure up to the couple's idea of perfection?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents as the young bakers show off their dessert skills, with a technical challenge in the shape of an animal - with the ultimate height and jiggle - and decorative trifles for the showstopper. Their efforts are judged by Liam Charles and Ravneet Gill

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Emily and Kris in the village of Somersham, Cambridgeshire, who are unsure whether to sell their three-bed semi or renovate instead. Primary school teacher Emily thinks they need a bigger home with more space for their growing children, but Kris feels their home has too much potential and would prefer to stay put

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. Her daughter and husband discuss how she has led an active life despite being diagnosed with a crippling illness at a young age. A 78-year-old man is rushed into A&E after falling down the stairs, and doctors fear he may have a bleed on his brain

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The return of the documentary, filmed with South Yorkshire Police just as the Covid-19 pandemic began to take hold in early 2020. In the middle of the night, PCs Dani Devey and Keeley Lees rush to help a traumatised woman, alone at home, as attackers rampage in the street - smashing up houses and cars. They also respond to an elderly, unwell man whose bedsit is under siege from attackers still on the scene

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: In the conclusion of this two-part documentary, Victoria Breeden is taken into custody, but claims she is not fit to be interviewed, while police search her home for evidence that proves she has attempted to hire someone to murder her husband. Detectives are determined not to release her, but DC Louisa Abbott fears she is dealing with the cleverest criminal she has ever encountered

programme.title: Scotland's Coastal Railways with Julie Walters
programme.desc: The actress travels the beautiful coastal railways of Scotland, and meets the vibrant characters who live and work along its shoreline. In North Berwick she chats to Jane McMinn, IT consultant-turned-master mariner and lobster breeder. Other destinations include Edinburgh, where Julie discovers the intriguing connections between the railway and the famous Balmoral Hotel's Palm Court and Clock Tower

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting to help one family and one pair of first-time buyers navigate the Bristol market. Kirstie's poker-loving couple, Liz and Ben, want to buy in their beloved Clifton where they have been renting. Meanwhile, Phil's searching for Greg and Joanna, who want to find a property in a family-friendly area within walking distance of daughter Oliwia's new school

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dr Javid Abdelmoneim reports on how the diet industry has adopted technology and takes a gym bike for a spin, as six more volunteers put the most popular diets to the test. Old friends Heena and Dhruti take on the coffee and chocolate diets, father and son Joe and Jad try the Mexican and K-pop diet diets, while Joan and Rosie get to grips with the macro diet and a smart app diet

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The bus arrives in Valencia, where Brendan organises an explosive visit to the world-famous science museum as sparks fly between two of the tourists

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: There is chaos at a B&B in France when a pipe bursts during check in. Hotel guests cannot find the bidet in Italy, while a restaurateur in Portugal runs out of cutlery

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton lines up five properties on Kefalonia for husband and wife Joe and Fiona, who fell in love with the Greek island during a sailing holiday 15 years ago

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: A few years ago Kieran Alexander was involved in a serious motorbike accident that has given her, and partner Dave Dwyer, a new outlook on life - that it is for living and there is no time like the present. They've decided to leave their stressful lives in the UK behind and start again in the Azores in the Atlantic. With a budget of £100,000 to fund their new home, Ben Hillman shows them five properties on the main island of Sao Miguel

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from in and around Newcastle, where first up is 25-year-old barista Delphinium, who's eager to prove that vegetarians can win with her travel-inspired menu. The guests she's hoping to impress this week are 64-year-old financial advisor David, art teacher Karen, development manager Mark and 34-year-old mobile hairdresser Deborah. It's an unusual evening complete with strange food, shocking name reveals and dessert taking an unexpected turn

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night of the competition in and around Newcastle, and art teacher Karen's turn to host. She's looking to impress her guests with a ginger-themed menu. Fussy eater Debs is unexcited at the prospect of goat's cheese or salmon en croute and is more concerned whether Karen has made her own pastry, and while vegetarian Delphinium is underwhelmed by Karen's menu, she really gets stuck into Karen's art class entertainment. Software salesman Mark winds Debs up about 64-year-old ladies' man David, who likes to shock the group with his antics in Ibiza

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Newcastle, mobile hairdresser and amateur musical songstress Debbie plans to bring showbiz razzle dazzle to her night. Humble pie from Mark shocks Karen, and there are very unusual dumplings for barista Delph and Ibiza-loving David to try

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in and around Newcastle, Ibiza-loving 64-year-old David plans an elaborate Ibizan-style menu of tapas and paella. However, the menu is all a bit much for Mark, and there's still the issue of Karen's bruised leg and bruised ego to deal with

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night from in and around Newcastle, and the turn of Essex boy Mark to impress his new Geordie chums with a menu of deep fried brie, slow-cooked lamb and a passion fruit pavlova. Debs, again, struggles with the menu but also lets out her personal feelings about the group. Art teacher Karen gets it in the neck for ruining other people's nights, Mark is accused of being boring, and David settles for bringing a very weird noise to the table

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie asks Doug to ignore her birthday, but he cannot bring himself to let it pass without celebration. Unfortunately, all his last-minute plans go awry

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug plans a romantic Valentine's Day meal out for Carrie - but gets trapped at a surprise birthday party for Spence. With Kevin James and Leah Rimini

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry are looking to buy a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain, and Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson lines up five great options for childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick, who are after a property in Estepona on Spain's Costa del Sol within their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents as the young bakers show off their skills with pastry, with the last chance for the first heat of bakers to go through to finals week. It's Pastry Day and the last chance in the first heat of bakers to go through to finals week. In the Technical Challenge, Liam Charles asks the contenders to recreate an object seldom expected to be seen in pastry form - and then give it a Caribbean-spiced twist. For the Showstopper, the bakers must use imagination and technique to build a scene of choux pastry that features themselves - a Selfie-Clair

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. In the second episode, Gordon and his team arrive at Blend on Main in New Jersey, where they get to work renovating the once popular restaurant which has fallen into decline, leaving the owner and chef Lou Smith $500,000 in debt

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The return of the documentary, filmed with South Yorkshire Police just as the Covid-19 pandemic began to take hold in early 2020. In the middle of the night, PCs Dani Devey and Keeley Lees rush to help a traumatised woman, alone at home, as attackers rampage in the street - smashing up houses and cars. They also respond to an elderly, unwell man whose bedsit is under siege from attackers still on the scene

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets master craftsman Paul, who has muscular dystrophy and is saving a Victorian circus wagon. George also finds out about a grain store being re-imagined as a festival bar, discovers a small hotel disguised as a tree and a camping pod that looks like a giant conker

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It

programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In the Worcestershire village of Broadway, two families were taken advantage of by a cafe owner to whom they lent £120,000 between them, each unaware that they were not the sole investor. In Bristol, Tim Wrigley ended up being on the receiving end of intimidation and abuse after tiring of his neighbour's increasing demands and bizarre gifts, while a Nottingham mother and son resort to filming their noisy neighbour after months of endless loud music, shouting and personal threats

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Close friends Janet Perrie and Fiona Hope moved to the South Ayrshire village of Dipple in search of an idyllic new life for themselves and their 22 dogs. Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. He then began to target them with increasingly intimidating behaviour - including mooning, two-finger salutes, shouting abuse, cutting holes in hedges and spying on them with binoculars

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: When Jane and Clive decide to enter a full relationship, they need to keep Sheila in the dark. David is not able to forgive Nicolette yet, leaving Aaron without an easy solution

programme.desc: Ari seems distant and down over Tane's condition, as well as Nikau and Bella moving to New Zealand. When Justin returns from hospital, Tori worries about his health

programme.desc: Cameras follow three super-sized individuals whose weight keeps them trapped in their own homes. Weighing nearly 60 stone, Keith is a virtual prisoner in his bed, and even washing him presents a huge challenge for his carers

programme.desc: Three pizza parlour waitresses reach turning points in their lives, but help each other through their problems. programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre feuds between neighbours. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: One-off edition of the documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Day-to-day life at a nursery for challenging three-to-five year olds, set up by psychologist Laverne Antrobus. Can Laverne help these and other children improve their behaviour?

programme.desc: Dr Ben Taylor and critical care paramedic Aiden Brown work with the the fire and ambulance services to rescue an 11-year-old boy trapped in the wreckage of a car he was a passenger in. Reigning champion Zydrunas Savickas took part alongside two-time Britain's Strongest Man Laurence Shahlaei, veteran American Nick Best and former Russian marine Mikhail Shivlyakov. Presented by James Richardson, Charlie Webster and Terry Hollands, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Steve and David were once good friends, but are now embroiled in an ongoing dispute that started with a simple off-the-cuff remark and soon spiralled into an all-out war over the ownership of a hedge. Also featured is a man who sent some workmates round to the house of a former mayor to collect money for unpaid building work, but ended up on the wrong side of the law himself when she complained to the police about his behaviour

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. The Webbs' peace in rural Plymouth was shattered when a new family moved in a few doors away, and a row about parking erupted into a full-blown punch-up. Meanwhile, Rita Grootendorst claims to have been the victim of a land grab by her next-door neighbours, although she is the one who has been arrested for assault and criminal damage over a drainpipe

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement agents try to mediate a dispute in a takeaway, and deal with rent evaders living in potentially deadly conditions. Plus, a businessman faces financial ruin

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Chloe and Aaron want to know how Nicolette's meeting went with Ricardo, and things seem good when Terese awards Amy the contract, but everything is about to go very wrong

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby starts to realise he might be the reason Bella is leaving. Angelo pushes Taylor to testify against Colby in order to have him arrested, but she refuses

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters (2013)
programme.desc: The fairytale brother and sister grow up to be renowned witch hunters, using advanced weaponry to battle the supernatural. Their latest case leads to an encounter with a powerful sorceress stealing children for an arcane ritual and a discovery about their own past. Fantasy adventure, with Gemma Arterton, Jeremy Renner and Famke Janssen

Horror based on Susan Hill's novel, with Daniel Radcliffe and Ciaran Hinds

programme.desc: Lupo and Green are called to the scene after a white teenage boy and a black girl are killed in a shooting near a neighbourhood playground. However, progress is slow when the detectives find locals unwilling to talk about the events, but two brothers who were friends of the murdered boy point them towards a suspect. Jeremy Sisto and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of Richard Speigel, chief financial officer for an exclusive, family owned department store, results in the arrests of the shop staff - but the manager and father refuses to let his offspring take the blame, and goes all out to get them off the hook. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs investigates the discovery of a woman's mummified remains, following a trail of clues that takes him and the team to Florida, where they search for another victim who mysteriously disappeared. One of their few leads is a manual on the secret of being a good wife - which eventually points them in the direction of a serial killer

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine helicopter is discovered abandoned in a crop circle with its pilots missing, and witnesses report seeing strange lights in the night sky, adding to the intrigue surrounding the case. Guest starring Timothy Bottoms (The Last Picture Show)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the rape and murder of a woman revives harrowing memories for Ducky, who once worked on a similar case in which the killer was never captured and vowed to return. Bafflingly, both victims were civilians dressed in the uniform of a lieutenant, and each had a trident symbol carved into their neck. Starring Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: The Murders
programme.desc: Kate and her new partner Nolan Wells investigate their first case, a complex and violent bank robbery where the perpetrators appear to have vanished into thin air

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson enlist the help of Dr Huang as they struggle to find a connection between a major pharmaceutical firm's illegal marketing campaign and the fatal shooting of two high-school students. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and BD Wong

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An eminent forensic psychiatrist is found beaten up and left for dead in a drug den. Benson and Stabler overcome the restrictions posed by doctor-patient confidentiality to uncover the link between the attack and an unsolved homicide. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Tutuola investigate when a prisoner dies in custody, and learn that he was assaulted before being incarcerated. This leads them to two police officers who are discovered to have been killing drug dealers - one for revenge, the other for money. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a baby girl with a genetic disorder is found inside a fridge. Drama, guest starring Judd Hirsch with Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Stephanie March

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team arrest an ensign in connection with the death of a Navy commander who had recently undergone surgery, but Abby believes they have got the wrong man. Another fatality soon follows - and it falls to Tony to save his colleagues. Starring Michael Weatherly

programme.desc: Stabler tries to rescue a youngster who has been kidnapped by a man with schizophrenia, but resorts to unorthodox tactics that jeopardise his own career. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

In the first edition, she heads to South Wales, where she deals with one of the most troubling cases she has ever seen. Jack is just months away from turning ten, the criminal age of responsibility, and is at risk of being locked up due to how badly he terrorises his dad. In addition to this, he has been expelled from school for attacking a pupil, so Mandy uses unconventional methods in an attempt to solve his behavioural issues

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The last leg sees James Braxton and Charles Hanson heading south over the Scottish border, taking their final purchases to auction in Berwick-Upon-Tweed in Northumberland. programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part two of two. Morgana and Helios have captured Camelot, leaving Arthur and Merlin on the run - and faced with the betrayal of a trusted courtier and the strength of the enemy, the king has lost the will to fight. It seems only the young servant can restore his master's faith - but only an extraordinary act can prove he was born to rule. Sword-and-sorcery adventure, starring Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath, with guest appearances by Ben Daniels, Miranda Raison and Terence Maynard

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Camelot faces a new golden age, but even as the city flowers, the dark seeds of destruction are being sown. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baxter, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: Panic (1963)
programme.desc: A jeweller's assistant is pursued by the police and a violent gang as she struggles to recall details of a shop raid in which she witnessed a murder. Drama, starring Janine Gray

programme.title: This Is London

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old woman in denial about the poor state of her health becomes emotional when Shaw Somers reveals her cholesterol levels are dangerously high, and a 24-year-old seeks help in controlling her irritable bowel syndrome. Giovanni Miletto lends his expertise to a sports enthusiast who suffers from crippling premenstrual stress, and joins Lucy Jones to investigate whether a man's extreme raw food diet might be damaging his body

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Tony Palmer's landmark series examines the effect the death of Beatles manager Brian Epstein had on the Swinging Sixties. Featuring archive footage of the Rolling Stones, Jimi Hendrix and the Who

programme.title: The Uber Story
programme.desc: Uber is among the most recognisable brands in the world. But their ride to success has been far from smooth. How did the app giant outsmart regulators and crush its competitors?

programme.title: The Crouches
programme.desc: Natalie still wants a little more out of life, so when the handsome Rev Garstang invites her along to a classical music concert, she jumps at the chance. Naturally, Roly's not too pleased about this turn of events, so he decides to confront the man threatening his marriage - only to end up admitting that if he were Natalie, he'd want to sleep with the newcomer too

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: A postman is anxious to catch a morning showing of The Sound of Muzak at the local cinema. However, he is unaware a blue movie is actually to be shown and that his wife is its star. Comedy, written by and starring Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Statue (1971)
programme.desc: A linguist's wife sculpts a nude statue of him to celebrate his achievements. However, when she grows weary of his neglect, she reveals that its impressive physique was modelled on another man. Convinced she has taken a lover, he sets out to identify the man behind the sculpture. Comedy, starring David Niven, Virna Lisi and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Blue Iguana (2018)
programme.desc: Eddie and Paul, former prisoners working in a New York diner, are made an offer they cannot refuse by English lawyer Katherine Rookwood. Romantic comedy, starring Sam Rockwell, Phoebe Fox and Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: Veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador whose cancer is eating away its front leg, by replacing its tumour with a custom-made implant, and uses the same technique to save the knee of a border collie. Senior surgeon Michael Hamilton also tends a chinchilla that needs urgent treatment on its arm bones after falling from a shelf

programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.desc: The wacky adventures of the cookie-loving dragons who live in a wizard's castle

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra writes a play about a brave animal and a princess

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zeek's Animal World
programme.desc: Follow alien robot Zeek as he tries to find out some fascinating facts about our animal kingdom

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks along the Isle of Man's stunning coast and visits Sprotbrough in South Yorkshire

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: Veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador whose cancer is eating away its front leg, by replacing its tumour with a custom-made implant, and uses the same technique to save the knee of a border collie. Senior surgeon Michael Hamilton also tends a chinchilla that needs urgent treatment on its arm bones after falling from a shelf

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Meet the people who have followed their own call of the wild to establish relationships with city animals, and the creatures that have adapted to thrive in this urban jungle

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Dentist on the Job (1961)
programme.desc: Two newly qualified dentists unwittingly get involved in the invention and promotion of a new toothpaste. Comedy, starring Bob Monkhouse, Ronnie Stevens, Kenneth Connor, Shirley Eaton, Eric Barker, Richard Wattis and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: High Treason (1951)
programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A distressed teenager explores cures for hair-loss, and a professional singer tries to save her career by learning to control her severe acid reflux. A mother fears her six-year-old son will be a target for bullying because of his psoriasis, and doctors help an obese father reverse damage done to his liver

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Tom and Roy take up Sally's offer of a week in a Highland croft, where she was going to stay with her boyfriend Mark before his death. While Roy quickly adapts to country life, Tom is soon bored and invites a recently dumped Amber to join them. However, a farcical situation ensues with the arrival of a couple of unexpected visitors

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Last Day of WW1
programme.desc: An account of how soldiers continued to be killed in battle hours after the armistice between the Allies and Germany had been signed in 1918. Presented by Michael Palin

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Jamie infiltrates a band of anti-capitalist terrorists who are using a state-of-the-art sniper's rifle, but his MI5 contact in the group loses her nerve and reveals his identity during preparations for their next hit. As Box 500 races to crack a coded message giving his location, Henno decides to take matters into his own hands and Red Troop embarks on a tense rescue bid. Drama, starring Jamie Draven and Ross Kemp

programme.title: Blue Iguana (2018)
programme.desc: Eddie and Paul, former prisoners working in a New York diner, are made an offer they cannot refuse by English lawyer Katherine Rookwood. Romantic comedy, starring Sam Rockwell, Phoebe Fox and Ben Schwartz

programme.title: What's Cooking? (2000)
programme.desc: The members of four diverse families meet up in their respective homes to celebrate Thanksgiving, where the growing Americanisation of the younger generation becomes ever more apparent to their parents, and tangled emotional battles are played out. Drama exploring multiculturalism in Los Angeles, starring Dennis Haysbert, Joan Chen, Julianna Margulies and Kyra Sedgewick

programme.title: Centrespread (1981)
programme.desc: A photographer in a dystopian future searches for a nude model he can turn into a star, a quest that leads him to question the society he has become a part of. Sci-fi drama, starring Kylie Foster and Paul Trahair

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.desc: An account of how soldiers continued to be killed in battle hours after the armistice between the Allies and Germany had been signed in 1918. Presented by Michael Palin

Olympic long-jump gold medallist Greg Rutherford also tackles the challenge, but will he match fellow athlete Mo Farah's record and scoop the jackpot?

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Pittsburgh Steelers' 2005 Super Bowl triumph over Seattle Seahawks at Ford Field in Detroit, Michigan. The Steelers became the fourth wildcard team to win the NFL's showpiece encounter as they claimed their fifth title overall, a feat that at the time could only be matched by the San Francisco 49ers and the Dallas Cowboys
